final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign.

Style/medium: needs a complex-yet-structured commercial poster aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typographic stacking with artistic lettering; must have a product or hero subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring some of the type layers
Subject: must include a product or hero subject as the focal element that occludes background type
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a promotional, high-energy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, attention-grabbing direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include artistic lettering (艺术字); must include font/type stacking (字体堆叠) with multiple overlapping text layers; composition must feel visually rich and complex but not chaotic — hierarchy must remain legible; product/subject must overlap at least some type elements
Avoid: flat or sparse layouts; cluttered illegible chaos
